drafting_order: Open with the Ch12 closure theorem: closure is lawful only when boundary, transport, truth, quarantine, and replay are typed together.
Draft the Square lens first to state the base entities and invariants needed by `Legality, Certificates, and Closure`.
Use the Flower lens second to translate `Legality, Certificates, and Closure` into lawful movement, transport, or operator transitions.
Use the Cloud lens third to define truth handling, ambiguity control, and live corridor behavior for `Legality, Certificates, and Closure`.
Use the Fractal lens fourth to bind `Legality, Certificates, and Closure` to replay, verification, and certificate-bearing return paths.
Integrate strongest external witnesses early: AQM TEXT BOOK, Constant FInder working, LEGAL TRANSPORT CALCULUS.
Use cross-family bridges to connect Ch12 outward: LEGAL TRANSPORT CALCULUS <-> QUAD HOLOGRAPHIC ROTATION.
Treat the existing manuscript draft as a prose scaffold, but reorder it around the compiled evidence stack and explicit witness obligations.
Close with a promotion ledger that marks which candidate cells are ready for proof tightening versus immediate drafting.
witness_obligations: All current cells have candidate local witnesses; remaining work is promotion, ordering, and proof tightening.
